# GitHub Copilot ŌĆö Workspace Instructions

## What this project is

AI-Pulse is a structured JSON registry of AI tools, models, and frameworks. The core data lives in `registry/*.json` files. Scripts compile it into a README; agents use Claude to curate it.

## Repository rules to follow

### Registry JSON files (`registry/*.json`)
- Every entry must have: `id`, `name`, `category`, `description`, `url`, `tags`, `added_date`, `stars_approx`
- `id` is kebab-case, lowercase, max 60 chars
- `category` must be one of: `llm`, `agent-framework`, `vector-db`, `mcp-server`, `tool`, `dataset`, `paper`, `course`, `project`
- `pricing` must be one of: `free`, `open-source`, `freemium`, `paid`, `enterprise`
- `maturity` must be one of: `experimental`, `beta`, `stable`, `production`
- `description` max 280 chars, `curator_note` max 140 chars
- `tags` is an array of 1ŌĆō10 lowercase strings

### Python files in `agents/` and `scripts/`
- Python 3.12+ ŌĆö use modern syntax (`list[dict]`, `str | None`, `match/case`)
- All agent scripts use the **Anthropic Python SDK** (`import anthropic`)
- Use `claude-opus-4-6` as the default model
- Use `thinking={"type": "adaptive"}` for Claude calls ŌĆö never `budget_tokens`
- Use streaming (`client.messages.stream(...)`) when processing batches or long outputs
- Apply `"cache_control": {"type": "ephemeral"}` on the system prompt block when making multiple calls with the same system prompt
- Never use `requests` or `httpx` to call Claude ŌĆö always use the official `anthropic` SDK

### README.md
- **Never suggest editing README.md directly.** It is auto-generated by `scripts/build_readme.py`
- If content needs to change, the source is the registry JSON files

### General coding conventions
- No external dependencies beyond `anthropic` for agent scripts; core scripts have zero deps
- Type hints on all function signatures
- Docstrings on module level and public functions
- CLI argument parsing via `argparse` (already the pattern in all scripts)
- Error handling: use typed `anthropic` exceptions, not bare `except Exception`

## Project-specific vocabulary

| Term | Meaning |
|---|---|
| **candidate** | An entry in `registry/candidates/` ŌĆö not yet approved for the main registry |
| **curator note** | The `curator_note` field ŌĆö a 140-char insight on *why* an entry matters |
| **registry** | The `registry/*.json` files ŌĆö the source of truth |
| **pipeline** | fetch ŌåÆ curate ŌåÆ review ŌåÆ validate ŌåÆ build_readme |

## Key file locations

| What | Where |
|---|---|
| Entry schema | `registry/schema.json` |
| Validation logic | `scripts/validate_registry.py` |
| README compiler | `scripts/build_readme.py` |
| Scraper | `scripts/fetch_new.py` |
| Claude agents | `agents/*.py` |
| CI workflows | `.github/workflows/` |
